def retry_sync(retry, attempt, item):
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    if retry:
        logger.info("retrying item")
    return item


def load_user(payload):
    try:
        return decode(payload)
    except Exception:
        logger.exception("decode failed")
        raise


def debug_payload(model):
    logger.debug(json.dumps(model))


def log_outcome(user_id, payload):
    logger.info("success", extra={"userid": user_id})
    logger.error("failure", extra={"account_id": payload["account_id"]})


def timed_operation(timer, connect, setup, cleanup):
    timer(connect())
    setup()
    cleanup()
    histogram.time()
